app.name: Fish-Afric
auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Access your sales workspace
auth.name: Full name
auth.emailTaken: An account already exists with this email.
demo.title: Demo
demo.subtitle: Try the app with sample data, no account needed.
demo.expired: Your 30-minute demo session has ended. Start a new demo to continue.
devis.title: Quotes
devis.noLines: Add at least one article to build the quote.
devis.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this quote and its payments?
devis.finalizeHelp: Enter the delivery date and address, then capture the client and salesperson signatures.
devis.emailNote: A summary e-mail to the manager will open automatically after finalization.
articles.title: Predefined articles
articles.note: These articles feed quote creation, grouped by family. Displayed prices are indicative — adjust them here. Editing an article never changes an already-issued quote (each quote keeps a copy of its lines).
payments.title: Payment tracking
payments.billedTip: Sum of the validated quotes shown.
payments.collectedTip: Sum of payments received on these quotes.
payments.note: Only validated quotes appear here. Balance due = quote total − sum of recorded payments.
receipt.title: Payment receipt
receipt.footer: Receipt generated automatically — thank you for your business.
email.devisFinalizedIntro: A quote has just been validated and finalized. Details below.
email.paymentIntro: A payment has just been recorded. Details below.
email.signaturesNote: The client and salesperson signatures are stored in the app and shown on the receipt.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your quotes and collections.
dashboard.emptyRecent: No quotes yet. Create your first quote to get started.
profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.guestNote: You are in a demo session: data is local and temporary (30 min).
about.title: About
about.tagline: Quote-management app for wholesale trade (fish cartons, fries bags, meat cartons).
about.b1: Fast quote creation from a predefined article catalog.
about.b3: Clear status tracking: in progress, validated, refused.
about.b4: Finalization with client and salesperson signatures.
about.b5: Payment entry (deposit or full) and receipt generation.
about.b6: Settlement tracking and remaining balance per client.
about.b7: FCFA amounts always exact, rounded to the integer.
about.b8: Manager / Salesperson roles and mobile access.
db.notReadyHelp: The Supabase connection works, but the tables are not created yet. Run supabase/setup.sql in Supabase (SQL Editor), then retry.
db.notConfiguredHelp: No Supabase database is configured. Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, or use guest access (demo) to try the app without a database.
errors.emptyDevis: A quote must contain at least one line.
errors.devisLocked: This quote can no longer be edited (already validated or refused).
errors.devisNotValidated: The quote must be validated first.
errors.paymentExceedsBalance: The amount exceeds the balance due.
